items.title: Why Analysts Still See Big Upside in Salesforce After the SaaS Scare
items.description: Salesforce is ready to rebound after overextending in early 2026. The SaaS apocalypse is overblown, setting up a buy-now! opportunity.

items.title: Meta's Platfroms' New Bull: Why Billionaire Bill Ackman Is Buying
items.description: Billionaire and hedge fund manager Bill Ackman just called Meta Platforms "deeply discounted", acquiring a multi-billion dollar stake in the company.
